lines.speaker: Rabbit Chef
lines.text: I could really do with your help, but the Duke hasn't given me permission to talk to you.

lines.speaker: Rabbit Chef
lines.text: What am I to do?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What's wrong?

lines.speaker: Rabbit Chef
lines.text: Oh bother, oh bother, oh bother, I'm in a terrible terrible mess! It's the annual Egg Descendance Day tomorrow, and I should be making him a big carrot cake.

lines.speaker: Rabbit Chef
lines.text: I've forgotten to buy the ingredients. I'll never get them in time now. The duke will turn me into soup! What will I do? I have 12 children to look after. Would you help me? Please?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes, I'll help you.

lines.speaker: Rabbit Chef
lines.text: Oh thank you, thank you. I need a carrot, a cabbage and a cake. I'd be very grateful if you can get them for me.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I have all of those ingredients on me already!

lines.speaker: Rabbit Chef
lines.text: That's an odd coincidence... Were you planning on making a carrot cake too?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Not exactly. I just had an odd feeling you might be needing these ingredients. If I see a rabbit cook, I presume there's food of some kind! Lucky guess I suppose.

lines.speaker: Rabbit Chef
lines.text: Well thank you! Hand them over, please.

lines.speaker: Rabbit Chef
lines.text: You've brought me everything I need! I am saved! Thank you!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: So do I get to go to the Descendance Day dinner?

lines.speaker: Rabbit Chef
lines.text: I'm afraid not, only the big carrots get to dine with the egg.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Sounds lame anyway, I didn't want to be invited.

lines.speaker: Rabbit Chef
lines.text: How dare you.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: So where do I find these ingredients then?

lines.speaker: Rabbit Chef
lines.text: It's something rabbits are constantly munching on, have a look in some of the houses nearby.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Won't they be annoyed I'm nicking their carrots?

lines.speaker: Rabbit Chef
lines.text: Who cares, Descendance day is far more important than their needs.

lines.speaker: Rabbit Chef
lines.text: I normally get my cabbage from the fields, on the other side of the river.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: There are rabbit farmers too!? How cute.

lines.speaker: Rabbit Chef
lines.text: That you'll have to have a nosey round for, rabbits around here are always celebrating something.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Lots of theft in the rabbit realm...

lines.speaker: Rabbit Chef
lines.text: You gotta do what you gotta do.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I've got all the information I need. Thanks.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Actually, I know where to find this stuff.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No, I don't feel like it, maybe later.

lines.speaker: Rabbit Chef
lines.text: Fine. I always knew you Adventurer types were callous rabbits. Go on, hop off!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: You don't look very happy.

lines.speaker: Rabbit Chef
lines.text: No, I'm not. The world is caving in around me - I am overcome by dark feelings of impending doom.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'd take the rest of the day off if I were you.

lines.speaker: Rabbit Chef
lines.text: No, that's the worst thing I could do. I'd get in terrible trouble.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well maybe you need to take a drink...

lines.speaker: Rabbit Chef
lines.text: That would be nice, but the great round one has banned all consumption of Cabbage flavoured drinks.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hmm, why not something that doesn't taste of cabbage?

lines.speaker: Rabbit Chef
lines.text: Have you tried Onion beer? It's disgusting.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm afraid I've run out of ideas.

lines.speaker: Rabbit Chef
lines.text: I know I'm doomed.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What's wrong?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Nice hat!

lines.speaker: Rabbit Chef
lines.text: Err thank you, it's a pretty ordinary rabbit cook's hat, really.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Still, suits you. I didn't know rabbits could wear trousers either.

lines.speaker: Rabbit Chef
lines.text: It's all standard rabbit cook issue uniform...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: The whole hat, rabbit trousers ensemble - it works. It makes you look like a real rabbit cook.

lines.speaker: Rabbit Chef
lines.text: I am a real rabbit cook! I haven't got the time to be chatting about Rabbinary Fashion. I am in desperate need of help!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What's wrong?

lines.speaker: Rabbit Chef
lines.text: How are you getting on?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I haven't got all of items yet, I'm still looking.

lines.speaker: Rabbit Chef
lines.text: Please get the ingredients quickly. I'm running out of time! The Duke will throw me into the streets!

lines.speaker: Rabbit Chef
lines.text: How are you getting on?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Here's one carrot.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Here's one cake, still uneaten.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Here's a fresh cabbage my hare.

lines.speaker: Rabbit Chef
lines.text: Thanks for ingredients you have got so far, please get the rest quickly. I'm running out of time! The Duke will throw me into the streets!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'll hop to it.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: So where do I find these ingredients then?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Here's one carrot.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Here's one cake, still uneaten.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Here's a fresh cabbage my hare.

lines.speaker: Rabbit Chef
lines.text: You've brought me everything I need! I am saved! Thank you!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: So do I get to go to the Descendance Day dinner?

lines.speaker: Rabbit Chef
lines.text: I'm afraid not, only the big carrots get to dine with the egg.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Sounds lame anyway, I didn't want to be invited.

lines.speaker: Rabbit Chef
lines.text: How dare you.
